tropical.s: Long growing seasons · high humidity · dense layering thrives.

semiarid.s: Hot summers · moderate rain · drought-tolerant + drip works best.

desert.s: Very low rainfall · extreme heat · xeriscape + windbreaks.

hill.s: Cool nights · short summers · berry shrubs & stone fruits.

rainforest.s: Heavy monsoon · fungal-rich soils · bamboo + dense canopy.

urbanhybrid.s: Heat island · terrace + balcony · Miyawaki pockets + edible.
